dialogues.speaker: ME
dialogues.text: Ahh... Such a normal life again. It’s been a while since summer holiday. I really miss my friend so much.

dialogues.speaker: ME
dialogues.text: Ah.. there is Yamal, He is one of my friend. It’s rare to see him this early!

dialogues.speaker: ME
dialogues.text: He looks confused... Lemme talk to him..

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Oh! Hi! I’m glad you’re here!

dialogues.speaker: ME
dialogues.text: What’s wrong? You look confused as true!

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Hehe.. Sorry to take your time before.. I’m having trouble finding my things.

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Can you help me look for them from this list? I’d be really happy if you could!

dialogues.speaker: ME
dialogues.text: Sure thing! We still got times before the class start. What should I find?!

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Oh... alright, I thought you were my REAL friend. I guess i have to check it by myself

dialogues.speaker: YAMAL
dialogues.text: Thank you.. I owe you one! Here’s a list of the things I’m trying to find. Hope you can help—good luck!
